title: arenaria benthamii
intro: Arenaria benthamii, also known as the Bentham's rock cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a succulent plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Arenaria benthamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
